name: qol-control
author: TyTxexebe
description:
QoL with advanced unit control and automation.

[accent]Commands (Chat):[]

[orange]󰚩 AI System[]
/ai mining <items?> - Toggle one or multiple items for auto-mining.
/ai build <name | -1> - Auto-assist player in build range (name regex support).
/ai lock - Hard-lock unit position and mining focus.
/ai status - Show current AI states and targets.

[orange]󰚩 Control & Tracking[]
/trace <toggle | set <unit> | find | status> - Auto-possess specific units.
/hp <name?> - HP/Shield overlay (targets or specific players).
/grab <item | toggle | min <val>> - Auto-collect items from nearby buildings.
/mining <set <units/items?> | <time> | stop | status> - Global unit mining distribution.

[orange]󰚩 Utilities[]
/lookat <x y | last <n?>> - Move camera to coords (last: saves coords-like messages to history so you can use them).
/here <text?> - Send current camera location and message to chat.
/cghost - Clear building plans located in enemy fire zones.

[orange]󰚩 Passive Features[]
- Super-fast unit rotation and Omura/Conquer face-target fix.
- Floating Camera Lock button for mobile users.
